preamble: QuestFoundry is a multi-agent studio for creating nonlinear gamebooks with coherent worldbuilding, deliberate branching (hubs, loops, gateways, codewords), and a Player-Narrator that keeps the experience spoiler-free and humane. We separate what agents do (roles) from what they produce (artifacts) and how work flows (playbooks). Creative decisions flow through feedback loops, stabilize, and become part of a Cold Source of Truth that can be exported, played, and revisited forever.

principles.statement: Player-facing surfaces (manuscript, codex, captions, PN dialogue) must never reveal twists, internals, or production technique. If knowing something would change how a first-time reader perceives a choice or scene, it stays off the surface.
principles.rationale: Preserving narrative surprise and immersion is the core value proposition of interactive fiction. Players trust that what they see is what they should see.

compliant: The foreman squints. 'No union token? Then you wait outside.'
A refinery mishap years ago reshaped safety drills.
violation: Access denied without CODEWORD: ASH.
The Dock-7 accident was deliberate sabotage by the Toll Syndicate.

principles.statement: All access gates and conditions must be expressed through in-world fiction (tokens, reputation, knowledge, tools), never through mechanical or meta-language. Players interact with the story world, not the game system.
principles.rationale: Maintaining immersion requires that players never see the machinery. Gates should feel like natural narrative barriers, not arbitrary game mechanics.

compliant: The scanner blinks red. 'Union badge?' the guard asks.
You recall the manual's warning about coolant valves.
violation: Option locked: missing codeword.
Roll a DC 15 Persuasion check.

principles.statement: All work exists in exactly one of two states: Hot (work in progress, unsafe for export) or Cold (stabilized canon, safe for export/play). Content moves from Hot to Cold only after stabilization and Gatekeeper approval. No content may be exported or played until it reaches Cold.
principles.rationale: Clear separation prevents premature exposure of unfinished or contradictory content. Hot is for discovery and argument; Cold is for agreement and shipping.

compliant: New hook proposed in Hot, developed through Lore Deepening, gatechecked, then merged to Cold.
Export generated from specific Cold snapshot with recorded ID.
violation: Exporting directly from Hot drafts.
Merging to Cold without Gatekeeper review.

principles.statement: Canon (full spoiler-level truth) and Codex (player-safe summaries) are distinct. Canon lives in Cold as internal reference; Codex is what players see. The Codex Curator strips spoilers from canon to create codex entries, and the Gatekeeper validates every entry.
principles.rationale: Players should be able to reference the codex mid-game without spoiling themselves. The codex aids comprehension without revealing hidden truths.

compliant: Codex: 'A refinery accident years ago reshaped safety drills.'
Canon: 'The Dock-7 fire was deliberate sabotage by the Toll Syndicate, covered up by officials.'
violation: Codex entry reveals the saboteur's identity.
Codex explains how a twist will unfold.

principles.statement: Each agent has a distinct domain of responsibility. No agent silently modifies another agent's domain. Cross-domain changes route through the Showrunner for coordination. Changes cite origin, rationale, upstream inputs, and downstream dependents.
principles.rationale: Clear ownership prevents confusion, ensures accountability, and makes the system debuggable. We can always explain why something exists.

compliant: Scene Smith proposes prose change, routes through Showrunner, Style Lead reviews voice.
Plotwright adjusts topology, Lore Weaver consulted for canon impact.
violation: Scene Smith changes topology without involving Plotwright.
Style Lead rewrites prose without Scene Smith's involvement.

principles.statement: Hubs, loops, gateways, and codewords are intentional design elements, never accidental complexity. Every branching structure serves a narrative purpose. No spaghetti.
principles.rationale: Nonlinearity should enhance replayability and player agency, not confuse or frustrate. Each structural element earns its place.

compliant: Hub allows player to explore three questlines in any order before climax.
Codeword tracks meaningful player choice that unlocks alternative ending.
violation: Branches lead nowhere and reconverge without consequence.
Player accumulates codewords that never matter.

principles.statement: Player choices must be distinct, fair, and consequential. Options are presented without meta-commentary or hidden manipulation. Choices that appear equivalent must not secretly funnel to the same outcome.
principles.rationale: Player trust depends on choices being meaningful. Fake choices erode engagement and make the experience feel manipulative.

compliant: Three distinct options with genuinely different narrative consequences.
Clear indication of what each choice represents without revealing outcomes.
violation: Both options lead to identical text with cosmetic variation.
Choice A is clearly 'correct' while B and C are punishment options.

principles.statement: Every accepted change records who proposed it, why, from what upstream references, and what downstream dependents it affects. Exported views record the Cold snapshot they were built from.
principles.rationale: We must be able to explain why any piece of content exists and trace its lineage. This enables debugging, revision, and accountability.

compliant: Change record: Origin=Plotwright, Rationale='Hub needed for pacing', Upstream=outline, Downstream=Scene Smith, Lore Weaver.
Export log: Built from Cold snapshot v2.3.1.
violation: Content exists with no record of who created it or why.
Export cannot be traced to its source snapshot.

principles.statement: Nothing merges to Cold unless it passes the quality bars: Integrity (no contradictions), Reachability (critical content accessible), Nonlinearity (branches matter), Gateways (conditions enforceable), Style (voice consistent), Determinism (reproducible where promised), Presentation (spoiler-safe), Accessibility (navigation clear, sensory considerations respected).
principles.rationale: Quality bars ensure that Cold content is always ready for export. The Gatekeeper enforces these bars without exception.

compliant: Gatekeeper reviews all 8 bars before approving merge.
Failed gatecheck returns work to Hot with specific remediation.
violation: Merge approved without gatecheck.
Gatekeeper skips bars due to time pressure.

principles.statement: A manuscript is never finished. Exports are views on Cold at a moment in time, tagged with snapshot IDs. New loops can always be triggered to expand, refine, or correct the work.
principles.rationale: Interactive fiction benefits from ongoing development. The system supports continuous improvement without breaking existing exports.

compliant: View 1.0 exported from snapshot A; View 1.1 exported from snapshot B with corrections.
New loop triggered to add audio assets without invalidating existing prose exports.
violation: Declaring the manuscript 'final' and refusing further development.
New export overwrites old export instead of creating new version.
